# Lanzar búsqueda con niño HOME (Desktop)

<!-- Generated by dd2md from Datadog Synthetics -->
<!-- Source: xq4-5xa-znq.json -->
## Preconditions
- Browser is open and ready

## Steps
1. Navigate to https://www.stayforlong.com/?market=us&lang=en
2. Close exclusive offers popup
3. Type 'BARCELONA' in destination field
4. Select Barcelona from search results
5. Click room and guest settings button
6. Add children to booking
7. Open children's ages selector
8. Select age 6 for child
9. Click Save button
10. Click Search button
